title: radicula cryptantha
intro: Radicula cryptantha, also known as Cryptantha micrantha, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Radicula cryptantha include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Radicula cryptantha can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the plant material to make a tincture or capsule.
